title: Dafi (bounty hunter)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image=[[File:DAFI_1.jpg]] |name=Dafi |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]{{SW|url=news/the-not-so-magnificent-seven|text=The Not-So Magnificent Seven|int=The Not-So Magnificent Seven|nolive=1}} |species=[[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]][[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]] |skin=Orange |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Now I can hurt him, right, Fud?|Dafi|}} '''Dafi''' was a [[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A longtime rival of the [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Jaxxon/Legends|Jaxxon]], Dafi developed a lifelong grudge against the Lepi after a botched run that cost Dafi two [[Limb/Legends|fingers]] and his [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Dafi helped an associate named [[Remel Fud]] hunt down Jaxxon on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] and [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] his sworn enemy, but was [[Blaster/Legends|shot]] and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Jaxxon's partner, [[Amaiza Foxtrain/Legends|Amaiza Foxtrain]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Name the planet, rabbit. Our leader, Captain Valance, is waiting... and there's unimaginable bounty at stake!"
"Blow it out yer retros!"
"Again, Dafi.|Remel Fud and Dafi torture Jaxxon for information|}} A [[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Dafi worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Dafi's base of operations at one point included the [[Corus system/Legends|Corus system]], where he met [[Jaxxon/Legends|Jaxxon]], a rough-and-tumble [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] who at the [[Time/Legends|time]] was running with a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] crew known as the [[Boys of Corus]]. Dafi and Jaxxon developed a rivalry, one that intensified after a botched run in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. The fiasco cost Dafi not only his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], but a [[Limb/Legends|finger]] from both of his hands—Dafi blamed Jaxxon for the run's failure, subsequently counting the Lepi as one of his most bitter enemies. [[File:DafiDeath.jpg|thumb|left|175px|Dafi is shot and killed by Amaiza Foxtrain.]] In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Dafi finally got the chance to settle the score. An old acquaintance, [[Remel Fud]], had found himself in the employ of a hunter named [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]], a vicious former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] officer who had been rebuilt as a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] after suffering crippling combat injuries. Valance was on the trail of a pair of high-profile Imperial [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]]—[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] heroes [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]—and believing the path to his targets led through Jaxxon, had dispatched Fud to track the Lepi down. Fud offered Dafi the opportunity to join him in the hunt for Jaxxon, and the H'nemthe jumped at the chance, even bringing some of his own muscle along for the ride. Dafi and Fud tracked Jaxxon down on the "[[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggler's]] [[Moon/Legends|Moon]]" of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], cornering the Lepi in an alleyway and shocking him into unconsciousness with an [[electroshock net]]. The hunters hog-tied Jaxxon and attempted to question him as to the whereabouts of Solo and Skywalker, and Dafi delighted in [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] his old rival with an "[[The Agony Inducer|Agony Inducer]]," a device of Fud's own design. However, the Lepi refused to budge, and before Dafi and Fud managed to extract the Rebels' location, Jaxxon's partner, [[Amaiza Foxtrain/Legends|Amaiza Foxtrain]], arrived and [[Blaster/Legends|gunned]] both hunters down. Although Fud ultimately managed to survive thanks to his tough, rubbery skin, Dafi [[Death/Legends|died]] from his wound. ==Personality and traits== An [[Color/Legends|orange]]-skinned, yellow-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] H'nemthe, Dafi was the type to hold a grudge—specifically, against the Lepi [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] Jaxxon, whom he blamed for the loss of not only his starship, but two of his fingers. Jaxxon's capture at the hands of Dafi and Fud allowed the H'nemthe to show off a sadistic side, as he took great joy in torturing his longtime rival. ==Behind the scenes== Dafi first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1978]]. Appearing as a nemesis of the [[rabbit]]-like Jaxxon, "Dafi" was named as an homage to [[Wikipedia:Daffy Duck|Daffy Duck]], a [[Wikipedia:Looney Tunes|Looney Tunes]] character who was a rival of [[Wikipedia:Bugs Bunny|Bugs Bunny]].{{Blog|pablog|60|Tales of the Big Green Bunny: Behind the Scenes of Gamer #4 — The Coachella Valley, and the Giant Carrot Festival}} Much of Dafi's backstory, including his [[Species/Legends|species]], was given 35 years later in ''[[The Not-So Magnificent Seven]]'', a [[StarWars.com]] blog post written by [[Greg Mitchell]]. During his appearance in the [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] series, Dafi was illustrated by [[Walter Simonson|Walt Simonson]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' (1977) 16]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 16}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin2|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2}} *{{SW|url=news/the-not-so-magnificent-seven|text=The Not-So Magnificent Seven|int=The Not-So Magnificent Seven|nolive=1}} *{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:H'nemthe]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
